text: No SaaS, no CRM, no enrichment, just an agent.
Hi, I'm Ishan, co-founder and CEO of ROX.
Today, I'm excited to launch ROX on autopilot to all.
Two years ago, we pioneered revenue agents
to accelerate revenue for the world's largest enterprises.
Two months ago, we hit an inflection point.
Our largest enterprise customers switched ROX
from co-pilot to autopilot.
One started to generate $40 million in pipeline a week.
Another automated $800 million in renewals.
And a largest customer now manages
over a billion dollars in deals.
Let me show you how it works.
First, ROX will build your pipeline.
It sources new leads, researches and enriches them,
creates personalized sequences
and communicates with customers.
ROX auto replies and has a full conversation
to book you meetings.
Second, ROX manages all of your deals.
It builds account plans, org charts, runs your meetings,
sends the follow-ups, flags risks, updates your ROX
or legacy CRMs and every other admin task.
Third, ROX autonomously grows your existing customers.
It unifies all your customer context
in one secure place in your data warehouse,
builds your expansion proposals,
generates the quotes and reaches out to your customers.
It's like having a rocket engine for your AI needs.
It's fast, it's scalable and it's safe.
We decided to partner with ROX,
who is the export in the revenue, in the go-to market.
We are able to get in front of far more customers
than we have been.
We did a full evaluation of multiple vendors in the space.
ROX was clearly an innovator.
Getting more qualified meetings is the ultimate goal.
This is something that we've seen an uptake in
since we started using the tool.
If you really want to have a positive impact
on your revenue quickly, I think you should go for ROX.
ROX on autopilot is open for all.
Try now at ROX.com.
